comparison.feature: SSE: Server to Client | WebSocket: Bidirectional

why_sse_over_websockets.conclusion: SSE is ideal for this use case: server pushes updates, client only receives.

task.objective: Show live test results as they complete during execution using Server-Sent Events.

goals.goal: Implement Server-Sent Events (SSE) for real-time updates
Show live progress during running executions

success_criteria.criterion: Memory doesn't leak with long connections

database_changes.note: No database migrations required - uses existing data with polling

testing_checklist.item: Memory doesn't leak with long connections

rollback.note: No database changes to rollback. Remove created files.

next_phase.name: test_timeline
next_phase.description: Visual timeline showing test execution duration and status
